title: Simple Boss Bars
description: The more beautiful solution to the vanilla boss bars!
body:
# Welcome to Simple Boss Bars!

This resource pack changes the vanilla boss bars to a more simple but beautiful design! All Minecraft bosses and modded bossfights who use a vanilla colored boss bar are supported.

Simple Boss Bars is integrated in a different resource pack called [Simple Bars](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-bars) which overhauls all bars in the game to be more simple but still aesthetically pleasing. So if you're looking for more simplified bars, definitely check that resource pack out!

## Minecraft Bosses
### Enderdragon
